title: Unify dashboard around paper-execution truth with shadow demoted to diagnostics
objective: Make the dashboard feel like one coherent execution pipeline: model recommendation -> bridge gating -> paper execution -> live position -> resolution. User-facing active positions and top-level counts must come from paper-execution truth only, while shadow/advisory remains visible only as secondary diagnostics.
constraints: keep scope focused on dashboard truth, monitoring integrity, and usability
preserve current working backend behavior unless a tiny backend addition is truly necessary
